name: Get listed on Superpages
description: Get a free business listing on Superpages, a popular online directory
main_title: Add or Claim Your Business Listing on Superpages
richtext:
Superpages is an online local business directory that provides business info, driving directions, working hours, and other details. It is a part of SuperMedia group, and was launched in 1996. Small businesses can claim their listings on Superpages, and manage user reviews.To List your business in Superpages, follow the below steps.

1.) Go to the Superpages website & click on “Claim My Business” Button.

2.) Choose the form that will help you update/change information about your business.

3.) Fill out the form with your contact information as well as your business information.

4.) Leave a message to Superpages about your requirement.

Multiple content image block

Step 1: Get To The Superpages Form

Vist the Superpages homepage. Scroll down to the bottom of the page to find a little box on the right. Click on the blue “Claim My Business” button.

Step 2: Choose the form

You should be redirected to a new page which has the following message.

Click on this form.

Step 3: Fill in Your Information

You need to fill out this form to claim or add your business on Superpages. It has 3 parts.

The first part requires you to select the reason for contacting Superpages. Luckily for us, the option

“Add, Edit or Remove a Listing” has already been selected.

The second part requires you to fill in your personal contact information followed by your business information.

Step 4: Leave a message

For the third part, write in a message that you would like to convey to Superpages in regard to your requirement.

Sample Messsage:

Hello, I would like to claim my business on Superpages. I’ve filled in the information as required. Feel free to contact me on my phone number that I’ve provided for any further information. I hope to claim my business listing at the earliest. Thank you.

‍

‍
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence
